gold: Như vậy thì tôi muốn đẩy nhanh quá trình nhận thẻ, tức là nhận thẻ sớm hơn.

sigWerErrors.reason: The word 'nhà' (house) is inserted before 'sớm hơn' (sooner), which changes the meaning of the sentence from receiving the card sooner to receiving the 'house card' sooner. This insertion significantly alters the intended meaning.
